content_of_post_to_answer: What are some practical tips to start enjoying subjects you usually find boring so you can study longer without getting distracted?
answer: A lot of people try to force interest before studying, but interest usually appears after understanding. Boring subjects often feel boring because the brain cannot see a pattern, purpose, or connection. Instead of asking “How do I enjoy this?”, try asking “What problem does this idea solve, and why did humans care enough to discover it?” Curiosity is often not the starting point of learning; it is the result of looking closely enough.
